message:
feat(discord): integrate SDK schema validation and extract reusable schemas

Wire fcp-sdk validation helpers into the Discord connector, following
the same pattern established by the Telegram connector:

Schema extraction (connector.rs):
- Extract send_message, edit_message, delete_message, get_channel,
  get_guild, and trigger_typing input/output schemas into static
  methods (12 new schema methods)
- Add input_schema_for() and output_schema_for() dispatch methods
  for runtime schema lookup by operation name
- Add message_event_schema() for the discord.message event
- Replace all inline json!({...}) in handle_introspect() with calls
  to extracted methods, ensuring introspection and validation share
  a single schema source of truth

Input validation integration:
- Add fcp-sdk dependency to connectors/discord/Cargo.toml
- Import validate_input_with_limits and validate_output_with_limits
- Call validate_input_with_limits() at the top of validate_input_early()
  before the existing business-rule validation (MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH,
  MAX_EMBEDS, etc.)

Output validation integration:
- Add validate_output_with_limits() calls after serialization in
  invoke_send_message, invoke_edit_message, invoke_delete_message,
  invoke_get_channel, invoke_get_guild, and invoke_trigger_typing
- Output violations map to FcpError::Internal per SDK convention

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
